sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: National Grid (US/ UK): Clean Energy Transition Pressures Test Dividend Reliability
feed.summary: National Grid faces significant investment demands due to the clean energy transition, impacting its dividend reliability. The company's U.S. expansion and regulatory environments in both the UK and U.S. create both opportunities and risks for investors. Its long-standing dividend streak is now under scrutiny as infrastructure costs surge and regulatory bodies cap returns, making it crucial for investors to monitor financials and policy shifts.

feed.title: e.l.f. Beauty Inc stock (US26866L1044): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors access news on e.l.f. Beauty Inc stock by delivering personalized, mobile-first insights directly to their feeds. This shift prioritizes proactive information delivery, allowing investors faster access to key updates on product launches, sales, and growth strategies without traditional searching. This enhanced accessibility to high-density, credible content will provide a significant informational edge in the fast-paced beauty sector.

feed.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: American Airlines, Marvell Technology, Strategy & more
feed.summary: This article details the premarket stock movements of several companies on Monday, April 20, 2026. Airlines saw declines due to increased US-Iran tensions and rising energy prices, while Marvell Technology surged on news of potential AI chip collaboration with Google. TopBuild also jumped on a $17 billion acquisition announcement by QXO, and Compass Pathways rose significantly after an executive order expedited psychedelic drug reviews.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $1,680,000 of CATERPILLAR INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) recently disclosed $1,680,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, covering a wide range of issues including diesel engine emissions, intellectual property, workforce challenges, tax issues, and trade policy. The article also provides updates on congressional stock trading, insider trading, hedge fund activity, and analyst ratings for CAT stock, highlighting both purchases and sales by various parties and outlining recent price targets from analysts.

feed.title: OneMain Holdings (OMF) COO sells 5,000 shares in pre-planned trade
feed.summary: Micah R. Conrad, EVP & COO of OneMain Holdings (OMF), sold 5,000 shares of common stock at $60.00 per share on April 17, 2026. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established in November 2025. After the sale, Conrad directly holds 101,250 shares of the company's stock.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley chief legal/admin officer Grossman sells $2.12m stock
feed.summary: Eric F. Grossman, Chief Legal/Admin Officer at Morgan Stanley, sold over $2.12 million worth of company common stock on April 20, 2026. This sale follows a significant 77.6% return on the stock over the past year, with shares trading near their 52-week high. Morgan Stanley recently reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations, and has received positive ratings and price target increases from several financial institutions.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $2,670,000 of UNITEDHEALTH GROUP INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: A recent lobbying disclosure reveals that UNITEDHEALTH GROUP INC (UNH) spent $2,670,000 in Q1 2026 on lobbying efforts covering a wide range of healthcare issues, including data privacy, value-based care, and drug pricing. The article also details recent congressional stock trading activity in UNH, hedge fund movements, and analyst ratings and price targets for the company.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $1,950,000 of CONOCOPHILLIPS lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips disclosed $1,950,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, focusing on permitting, environmental regulations, and oil and gas development. This update also highlights recent congressional stock trades, insider trading activities, and hedge fund movements related to COP stock, alongside analyst ratings and price targets.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Stock Price Down 1.7% After Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) saw its stock price drop 1.7% after JPMorgan Chase & Co. lowered its price target, amidst a series of other analyst downgrades. Despite the recent dips, analysts still maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the company, with institutional investors continuing to hold significant stakes. P&G also recently increased its quarterly dividend, reinforcing its position as a reliable dividend stock.

feed.title: Eaton Corporation plc (ETN): Industrial Firm Growing Dominant in Liquid Cooling
feed.summary: Eaton Corporation plc (ETN) is rapidly becoming a key player in the liquid cooling market, spurred by its recent acquisition of Boyd’s thermal business and the growing demand for advanced cooling solutions in AI data centers. The company's new Data Center segment and strong performance in its Electrical Americas division, along with a significant $13.3 billion backlog, indicate robust future growth and a shift towards integration in power and cooling. Analysts project strong EPS growth, positioning Eaton more like a software company than a traditional industrial firm.

feed.title: Is Cisco Systems (CSCO) One of the Best AI Data Center Stocks to Buy Right Now?
feed.summary: Cisco Systems (CSCO) is highlighted as a compelling AI data center stock, seen by hedge funds as a value play. The company is transitioning from a hardware provider to an AI-native security and networking powerhouse, evidenced by significant AI infrastructure orders from major cloud providers. Cisco's strategic shift and high-margin software integration, alongside an anticipated hardware upgrade cycle driven by AI, position it for continued growth, although other AI stocks may offer higher upside potential.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics Inc. reported a first-quarter profit of $403.4 million, or $2.78 per share, falling slightly short of analyst estimates of $2.79 per share. The company's revenue for the quarter was $5.2 billion, which exceeded Wall Street forecasts. This financial data was generated using information from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: GS Finance (GS) offers autocallable GEARS notes linked to 31-stock basket (trade date Apr 24, 2026)
feed.summary: GS Finance Corp. is offering Trigger Autocallable GEARS notes linked to an equally weighted basket of 31 stocks, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. These notes provide leveraged upside (1.50x gearing) if not automatically called and the basket performs well, but expose investors to full downside risk if the final basket level falls below 75% of its initial level. The notes have an expected trade date of April 24, 2026, and an expected maturity date of April 27, 2029, with potential automatic redemption on May 3, 2027, if the basket reaches an autocall barrier.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $1,800,000 of PEPSICO INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: A new Lobbying Disclosure Act filing reveals that PepsiCo Inc. disclosed $1,800,000 in lobbying expenses for Q1 2026, covering issues from nutrition labeling and food safety to agricultural acts and recycling policies. The article also details recent congressional and insider trading activity in PEP stock, as well as hedge fund movements and analyst ratings for the company.

feed.title: Linde plc stock (IE000S9YS762): Why industrial gas demand matters more now
feed.summary: Linde plc is positioned for long-term growth in the industrial gas sector due to increasing global demand for hydrogen and clean energy solutions, as well as its essential role in electronics and healthcare. The company's diversified business model, strong financial performance, and investments in clean hydrogen projects make it an appealing investment for those seeking exposure to decarbonization and steady returns. Despite potential risks from energy costs and cyclical industries, Linde's global diversification and strategic focus on high-growth areas provide resilience.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $3,360,000 of GENERAL DYNAMICS CORP lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: GENERAL DYNAMICS CORP disclosed $3,360,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, covering a broad range of issues related to Fiscal Year 2026 and 2027 appropriations and authorizations for defense, homeland security, and other government sectors. The lobbying efforts focused on funding for shipbuilding, submarines, defense systems, cybersecurity, and various other programs. The article also provides details on recent congressional stock trading, insider trading activity, hedge fund movements, and analyst ratings for GD stock.

(DAL) has disclosed $1,700,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, covering a wide range of issues including appropriations, aviation regulations, clean energy provisions, and various congressional/regulatory matters. feed.title: Lobbying Update: $1,500,000 of GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY (INCLUDING SUBSIDIARIES) lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: A recent lobbying disclosure revealed that GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY (INCLUDING SUBSIDIARIES) spent $1,500,000 in lobbying during Q1 2025, addressing issues from NASA appropriations to defense programs and trade policies. The report also highlights recent trading activity of GE stock by members of Congress and company insiders, as well as significant institutional investor movements and analyst ratings with a median price target of $351.5.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $1,810,000 of HCA HEALTHCARE INC. lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare Inc. recently disclosed $1,810,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, focusing on healthcare legislation. The article also details significant insider stock sales ($28.3 million) and institutional investor activity, with some major firms decreasing positions while others increased. Analyst ratings for HCA are predominantly positive, with a median price target of $550.5.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $3,190,000 of GILEAD SCIENCES INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences Inc. has disclosed $3,190,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, focusing on drug pricing, intellectual property, global supply chain, and various health-related legislative acts. The company also saw significant insider selling activity, with Chairman & CEO Daniel Patrick O'Day selling over $40 million in shares, and mixed hedge fund activity. Wall Street analysts maintain a positive outlook, with six firms issuing "Buy" ratings and a median price target of $155.0.

feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation (BAC) recently disclosed $1,680,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, targeting issues such as cybercrime, regulatory capital, deposit insurance reform, renewable energy tax credits, and digital asset regulations. The article also details recent congressional stock trading, insider trading activity with significant sales, and changes in institutional investor holdings for BAC. Analyst ratings remain largely positive, with a median price target of $61.0 from 15 analysts.

feed.summary: A recent Lobbying Disclosure Act filing revealed that MERCK & CO INC (MRK) disclosed $4,150,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q1 2026, targeting issues such as the Pharmacy Benefit Manager Reform Act, drug pricing, and various appropriations legislations. The article also details recent congressional and insider trading activity in MRK stock, as well as hedge fund movements and analyst ratings, indicating a mix of institutional interest and continued insider sales.

The report also highlights recent congressional stock trading, insider purchases, and significant institutional investor activity related to HUM stock. Wall Street analysts have issued mostly "Buy" ratings and price targets, with a median target of $195.0.

feed.title: AbbVie and BioLabs Team Up to Support Life Sciences Innovation in Canada
feed.summary: AbbVie announced an expanded partnership with BioLabs, becoming the founding sponsor of the new BioLabs University of Toronto. This collaboration aims to accelerate life science research and foster innovation in Canada's biotech sector, including providing laboratory space and mentorship to early-stage startups. The initiative supports the Ontario Life Sciences Strategy and strengthens the region's position as a biomanufacturing and life sciences hub.

feed.title: SpaceX Steals Spotlight From KKR, Triton With One Deal - Vodafone Group (NASDAQ:VOD)
feed.summary: In the first quarter of this year, global private equity exit volume decreased, but aggregate transaction value surged thanks to Elon Musk's record-setting $250 billion deal between SpaceX and xAI. This merger, which made up about 80% of the total transaction value for the quarter, redefined global M&A, surpassing Vodafone's 2000 acquisition of Mannesmann. The IPO market, however, remained challenging despite a gradual recovery in 2025.

feed.title: Evercore ISI raises KeyCorp stock price target on earnings outlook
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) to $26 from $24, maintaining an Outperform rating, following the bank's strong first-quarter 2026 results. The firm also raised its earnings per share estimates for 2026 and 2027, factoring in higher net pre-provision net revenue and increased share repurchases. This positive adjustment aligns with other analysts who also raised their price targets on KeyCorp, citing factors like strong loan growth and balance sheet strength.

feed.title: NaaS Technology Inc stock (US62874Q1040): Why its EV charging expansion matters more now for global investors?
feed.summary: NaaS Technology Inc is strategically positioned in China's booming EV charging market with an asset-light "Network-as-a-Service" model, partnering with station owners and focusing on software platforms for billing, scheduling, and maintenance. This approach allows scalable expansion without heavy capital investment, making it an attractive option for global investors looking for exposure to the electrified mobility sector, particularly in English-speaking markets. While offering diversification and potential for growth, the company faces risks including geopolitical tensions, competition, economic slowdowns in China, and regulatory shifts, requiring careful monitoring by investors.

feed.title: Xcel Energy warns of possible public safety power shutoffs in western, southern Colorado due to high fire danger
feed.summary: Xcel Energy has announced potential public safety power shutoffs in parts of western and southern Colorado, including Garfield, Mesa, Pitkin, Alamosa, Conejos, Costilla, Rio Grande, and Saguache counties, starting Wednesday. This measure is due to high fire danger from strong winds, dry conditions, and low humidity, exacerbated by existing drought conditions and a Red Flag Warning. Customers, especially those in remote areas or relying on medical equipment, are advised to prepare for outages that could last several hours to days as crews inspect and repair lines.

feed.title: GM CEO Mary Barra's salary divulged, plus a big surprise
feed.summary: General Motors' CEO Mary Barra received a 1.3% pay raise in 2025, bringing her compensation to nearly $30 million. The board also approved a significant, one-time hiring package of $40 million for Sterling Anderson, who was named Chief Product Officer, amidst media speculation he could be a successor to Barra. Other GM executives also saw pay increases, and the company adjusted its executive compensation structure to align with strategic growth areas.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics reports record profit as Fort Wayne steelmaker ships more than ever
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics reported a record first-quarter profit of $403 million, significantly up from previous quarters, driven by record steel shipments and higher steel prices. The Fort Wayne-based company also saw strong performance in its metals recycling and steel fabrication operations, despite an initial operating loss in its aluminum division. Steel Dynamics increased its cash dividend by 6% and expects robust domestic steel and aluminum demand throughout 2026.

feed.title: Advisor moves: Baird lands $1 billion team from Goelzer in Indianapolis
feed.summary: Baird has recruited a three-advisor team, HWB Partners, from Goelzer Investment Management in Indianapolis, bringing approximately $1 billion in client assets. Separately, Fair Oaks Wealth Management, led by Bob Halbert, has moved its $140 million practice from Edward Jones to Ameriprise Financial's independent channel. Additionally, Prime Capital Financial has expanded its Fort Worth office by adding Shane Miller as a partner and managing director, enhancing its tax-focused planning capabilities.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Class A stock (US02079K3059): Is AI dominance strong enough to unlock sustained upside
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) offers investors exposure to a diversified tech giant driven by search advertising, cloud computing, and AI breakthroughs. The article explores how Alphabet's market dominance, particularly in AI, positions it for sustained growth despite regulatory pressures and competition. It also highlights analyst bullishness and key risks like antitrust scrutiny, emphasizing the importance of AI investments for future profitability.

feed.title: Second Jury Finds Uber Responsible for Sexual Assault by a Driver
feed.summary: A federal jury in North Carolina found Uber liable for sexual assault by a driver, marking the second consecutive defeat for the company in more than 3,000 pending lawsuits. The plaintiff, Brianna Mensing, was awarded $5,000, significantly less than in a previous bellwether case. Uber maintains the vast majority of its trips are incident-free and plans to appeal both verdicts, while critics call for increased accountability for the prevalence of sexual violence during rides.

feed.title: Judge Approves $425M Capital One Settlement Deal – Here's How Much You'll Get
feed.summary: A federal judge has approved a revised $425 million settlement for Capital One 360 Savings account customers who were reportedly misled about interest rates. Millions of current and former customers are now eligible for larger payments than initially expected, with payouts anticipated to begin in the coming months. The settlement also mandates that Capital One raise the interest rate on its 360 Savings accounts to match the higher-yielding 360 Performance accounts.

feed.title: Autocallable notes linked to Palo Alto Networks (AMUB) due Apr 23, 2029
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Palo Alto Networks, Inc. common stock, maturing April 23, 2029. These notes provide periodic contingent coupons if the underlying stock meets a coupon barrier and are subject to automatic early call if the stock reaches its initial level. Investors face principal loss if the notes are not called and the final stock level falls below a downside threshold.

feed.title: UBS Airbag Autocallable Notes (AMUB) linked to Freeport‑McMoRan — 1‑yr note
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering 1-year Airbag Autocallable Yield Notes linked to the common stock of Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX). These notes provide regular coupon payments (illustrative 8.04% per annum) unless automatically called early if the underlying stock meets or exceeds its initial level. If not called, principal repayment at maturity is contingent on the final level relative to a downside threshold, with leveraged downside exposure if the final level falls below this threshold.

feed.title: Autocallable Notes Linked to Freeport‑McMoRan (AMUB) — Contingent Coupons, Credit Risk
feed.summary: UBS has priced Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Freeport-McMoRan Inc. common stock, due April 24, 2028. These high-risk, conditional equity-linked notes offer periodic contingent coupons if the underlying meets a coupon barrier and may be automatically called early if the underlying meets or exceeds the initial level. Investors face the risk of losing a significant portion or all of their principal investment if the notes are not called and the final level is below the downside threshold, in addition to UBS's credit risk.

feed.title: Uber Loses Second Bellwether Trial in Passenger Assaults Case
feed.summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has lost its second federal bellwether trial concerning passenger sexual assaults. A North Carolina jury found an Uber driver committed battery and awarded the female passenger $5,000 in damages after he placed his hand on her thigh and made sexual comments during a 2019 ride. This verdict follows a previous loss where a jury awarded $8.5 million in a similar case.

feed.title: Autocallable Notes Linked to GOOGL — Bank of Montreal (BMO) Pricing
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) has priced $4.25 million in Senior Medium-Term Autocallable Barrier Notes with Memory Coupons, linked to Alphabet Inc. Class A common stock (GOOGL). These notes offer quarterly contingent coupons of 2.825% if GOOGL's price meets certain conditions, with potential for automatic redemption and risks including principal loss if the stock falls below a trigger level. The offering priced on April 16, 2026, and matures on October 21, 2027.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal (BMO) sells 26.50% Digital Return Notes linked to CEG/NRG/NEE
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) has priced US$1,675,000 of Senior Medium-Term Digital Return Notes, Series K, due April 28, 2027. These notes are linked to an equally weighted basket of Constellation Energy (CEG), NRG Energy (NRG), and NextEra Energy (NEE), offering a 26.50% digital return at maturity if the basket's final level is at or above its initial level. However, investors face a 1% loss of principal for each 1% decline in the basket, potentially leading to a 100% loss.

feed.title: Prologis files for two part notes offering of $1.25 billion
feed.summary: Prologis has filed for a two-part notes offering totaling $1.25 billion. This announcement follows an earlier disclosure that ProLogis LP also filed for an offering of CAD denominated notes, though the size of that offering was not specified.

feed.title: Magnite CFO David Day to retire after decade in role By Investing.com
feed.summary: Magnite's CFO, David Day, is set to retire after ten years in the role, continuing as CFO until September 30, 2026, and then serving as a special advisor. The company has initiated a search for his replacement while reaffirming its financial expectations for Q1 and full-year 2026. Day's tenure included overseeing significant mergers and acquisitions, contributing to the company's profitability and growth in the sell-side advertising platform sector.

feed.title: Wells Fargo (WFC) prices $1,000 notes at 4.50% with callable feature
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company (WFC) is offering fixed-rate medium-term notes with a principal amount of $1,000 and an interest rate of 4.50% per annum. The notes mature on May 4, 2031, with interest payable semi-annually, and include a callable feature allowing Wells Fargo to redeem them early. These senior unsecured obligations are not FDIC insured and are subject to the issuer's credit risk.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. stock (US8725901040): Is 5G leadership strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. is positioned as a leader in the U.S. wireless market due to its aggressive 5G rollout and subscriber growth, driven by its postpaid-focused business model and vast mid-band spectrum holdings. Analysts maintain positive ratings for the stock, citing strong net adds and improving EBITDA margins, but investors should monitor competitive pressures and the efficiency of 5G buildout. The company's U.S.-centric operations and dividend growth potential make it an attractive option for growth-oriented portfolios in English-speaking markets.

feed.title: Sysco (NYSE: SYY) raises $6B term and revolver financing to back Jetro acquisition
feed.summary: Sysco Corporation has secured $6 billion in new credit facilities, comprising a $3 billion revolving credit agreement and a $3 billion term loan, to finance its acquisition of Jetro Restaurant Depot. These facilities, dated April 16, 2026, will be used to fund the merger, refinance Jetro's existing debt, and cover transaction fees. The agreements include standard covenants and maturity dates, with the revolver maturing in 2031 and the term loans maturing in 364 days and two years from the closing date, respectively.

feed.title: 27.0M-share resale registered as NetClass (NASDAQ: NTCL) for selling shareholders
feed.summary: NetClass Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: NTCL) has registered the resale of up to 27.0M Class A Ordinary Shares for certain selling shareholders. The company will not receive any proceeds from these resales. The prospectus highlights significant risks related to NetClass's operations in the PRC, including cybersecurity reviews, capital controls, and PCAOB inspection requirements, which could impact its listing and ability to transfer funds cross-border.
